title: eryngium octophyllum
intro: Eryngium octophyllum, also known as sea lavender or octopus flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. Eryngium octophyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy in many cultures.
